value.found_quote: Plugins are namespaced bundles that allow you to extend Antigravity's capabilities by grouping skills, rules, MCP servers, and hooks into a single package.
value.rationale: The page directly and verbatim substantiates every element of the claim: Plugins are described as "namespaced bundles," they group "skills, rules, MCP servers, and hooks into a single package," and they are used to extend Antigravity. The page presents this as a current, generally available feature with detailed documentation on directory structure, components, and how to add plugins, indicating an active lifecycle status.
